def negative_abstract_contracts_and_heavy_concrete_implementations_live_in_same_file():
    rule_id = "abstract_contracts_and_heavy_concrete_implementations_live_in_same_file"
    family = "structure"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag files that mix contracts with large concrete implementations and grow unstable dependencies."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
